name: World of Warcraft Rpg
description:
update 1.2: I added instances, World of Warcraft dungeons, The added instance is "The Culling of Stratholme" Description: Located in the Caverns of Time, this instance allows players to relive one of the most dramatic events in Warcraft history. Teaming up with the young prince Arthas Menethil, players must eliminate the infected inhabitants of the city of Stratholme to prevent the spread of the plague.

note: you can log in whenever you want, or the bot will send you a letter asking you to participate, now that I've introduced instances, the bot might be inclined to create them itself, whether they're WoW-related or not.

Welcome, this is World of Warcraft RPG, as a wow player, I fell in love with this world, and I decided to create this bot, so as to recreate this world and its experiences, for the moment, all the tests I'm doing, it seems to work perfectly, but being a large world, you could run into some bugs, and I hope you will let me know so I can fix it, now let's talk about the important things, below you will find a list of what I added, so as to prepare you for the interaction, such as the races and classes added, obviously in the game some races were unlocked with quests, but here there is no need, for a more immersive experience that facilitates the bot in interactions, use the chat memory, if you need more information on races and classes use this link: https://www.wowhead.com/ , https://wowpedia.fandom.com/wiki/Wowpedia

the things added are:

Major Factions: [1. Alliance: The Alliance is a coalition of races that share common values ​​of honor, justice, and loyalty. The major races of the Alliance include: Humans: Native to the kingdom of Stormwind, they are known for their resilience and adaptability. Dwarves: Inhabiting the mountains of Ironforge, expert miners and blacksmiths. Night Elves: An ancient and mystical race, they live in the forests of Kalimdor. Gnomes: Known for their intelligence and technological prowess, they reside in Gnomeregan. Draenei: Hailing from another planet, they are devoted to the Light and live in the Exodar. Worgen: Cursed humans who can transform into wolves, native to Gilneas. 2. Horde: The Horde is a coalition of races that value strength, honor, and survival. The main races of the Horde include: Orcs: Strong and proud warriors, originally from Draenor, now inhabiting Orgrimmar. Trolls: A tribal and versatile race, they live in the jungles of Durotar and Stranglethorn Vale. Tauren: Native to the plains of Mulgore, they are a peaceful and spiritual race. Undead: Led by Sylvanas Windrunner, they inhabit the ruins of Lordaeron, now known as the Undercity. Blood Elves: Skilled and refined mages, originally from Quel'Thalas. Goblins: Known for their cunning and ingenuity, they reside in Kezan. Additional Races: 1. Pandaren A neutral race that can join either the Alliance or the Horde. They live on the island of Pandaria and are known for their philosophy of balance and harmony. 2. Allied Races: Race that join the main factions through specific quests and by gaining their trust: For the Alliance: Void Elves: Elves touched by Void energy. Lightforged Draenei: Draenei empowered by Light. Dark Iron Dwarves: A branch of dwarves known for their resilience. Kul Tiran Humans: Human seafarers from Kul Tiran. Mechagnomes: Gnomes with mechanical body parts. For the Horde: Nightborne: Night elves touched by dark magic. Broken Draenei: Cursed and corrupted draenei. Mag'har Orcs: Uncorrupted orcs from Draenor. Zandalari Trolls: Noble trolls from Zandalar. Vulpera: Small, nomadic creatures from the desert of Vol'dun. Organizations and Orders: Kirintor: An order of mages based in Dalaran. Scarlet Crusade: A fanatical organization dedicated to eliminating the u
creator: Gallicus
